text.title: Load Balancer Health Checks Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals (probe split, dep depth, runtime, LB) to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Liveness and readiness on the same path?

conclusion.verdict: add SELECT 1, PING, broker heartbeat — return 503 if any fails

branch.question: Each dep call bound by per-call timeout?

conclusion.verdict: wrap every dep call in 1-5 s timeout; explicit 503 on timeout
set interval 10-30 s, healthy >= 2, unhealthy >= 2 (cloud) or 3 (HAProxy)
LB probe must assert status 200 (http-check expect / status_match)

text.example: same_path=true → split into /live + /ready → touches_deps=true (DB+Redis) → timeouts=true (3 s + 2 s) → thresholds_ok=true (interval=10, healthy=2, unhealthy=3) → expect-status=200 → satisfies all 5 rules.
